column4: These are the stages of the children of {{c1::Israel}}, by which they went forth out of the land of Egypt by their hosts under the hand of Moses and Aaron.

And the LORD spoke unto {{c1::Moses}} in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying:
And the LORD spoke unto Moses in the plains of {{c1::Moab}} by the Jordan at Jericho, saying:
’Speak unto the children of {{c1::Israel}}, and say unto them: When ye pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,
’Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye pass over the {{c1::Jordan}} into the land of Canaan,
then ye shall drive out all the {{c1::inhabitants}} of the land from before you, and destroy all their figured stones, and destroy all their molten images, and demolish all their high places.
then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from {{c1::before}} you, and destroy all their figured stones, and destroy all their molten images, and demolish all their high places.
And ye shall drive out the inhabitants of the land, and dwell therein; for unto you have {{c1::I}} given the land to possess it.
And ye shall drive out the {{c1::inhabitants}} of the land, and dwell therein; for unto you have I given the land to possess it.

And ye shall {{c1::inherit}} the land by lot according to your families—to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer thou shalt give the less inheritance; wheresoever the lot falleth to any man, that shall be his; according to the tribes of your fathers shall ye inherit.

And ye shall inherit the land by lot {{c1::according}} to your families—to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer thou shalt give the less inheritance; wheresoever the lot falleth to any man, that shall be his; according to the tribes of your fathers shall ye inherit.

But if ye will not drive out the {{c1::inhabitants}} of the land from before you, then shall those that ye let remain of them be as thorns in your eyes, and as pricks in your sides, and they shall harass you in the land wherein ye dwell.

But if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from {{c1::before}} you, then shall those that ye let remain of them be as thorns in your eyes, and as pricks in your sides, and they shall harass you in the land wherein ye dwell.
And it shall come to pass, that as {{c1::I}} thought to do unto them, so will I do unto you.
And it shall come to pass, that as I {{c1::thought}} to do unto them, so will I do unto you.
And the LORD spoke unto {{c1::Moses}}, saying:
And the LORD spoke unto Moses, {{c1::saying}}:

’Command the children of {{c1::Israel}}, and say unto them: When ye come into the land of Canaan, this shall be the land that shall fall unto you for an inheritance, even the land of Canaan according to the borders thereof.

’Command the children of Israel, and say unto them: When ye come into the land of {{c1::Canaan}}, this shall be the land that shall fall unto you for an inheritance, even the land of Canaan according to the borders thereof.
Thus your south side shall be from the wilderness of {{c1::Zin}} close by the side of Edom, and your south border shall begin at the end of the Salt Sea eastward;

and your border shall turn about southward of the ascent of {{c1::Akrabbim}}, and pass along to Zin; and the goings out thereof shall be southward of Kadesh-barnea; and it shall go forth to Hazar-addar, and pass along to Azmon;

And ye shall mark out your line for the east border from Hazar-enan to {{c1::Shepham}};
and the border shall go down from {{c1::Shepham}} to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall go down, and shall strike upon the slope of the sea of Chinnereth eastward;

And {{c1::Moses}} commanded the children of Israel, saying: ‘This is the land wherein ye shall receive inheritance by lot, which the LORD hath commanded to give unto the nine tribes, and to the half-tribe;

for the tribe of the children of {{c1::Reuben}} according to their fathers’houses, and the tribe of the children of Gad according to their fathers’houses, have received, and the half-tribe of Manasseh have received, their inheritance;

the two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the {{c1::Jordan}} at Jericho eastward, toward the sun-rising.’

And the LORD spoke unto {{c1::Moses}} in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying:

’Command the children of {{c1::Israel}}, that they give unto the Levites of the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and open land round about the cities shall ye give unto the Levites.

And the {{c1::cities}} shall they have to dwell in; and their open land shall be for their cattle, and for their substance, and for all their beasts.

And the open land about the {{c1::cities}}, which ye shall give unto the Levites, shall be from the wall of the city and outward a thousand cubits round about.

And ye shall measure without the city for the east side two thousand cubits, and for the south side two thousand cubits, and for the west side two thousand cubits, and for the north side two thousand cubits, the city being in the midst. {{c1::This}} shall be to them the open land about the cities.

And ye shall {{c1::measure}} without the city for the east side two thousand cubits, and for the south side two thousand cubits, and for the west side two thousand cubits, and for the north side two thousand cubits, the city being in the midst. This shall be to them the open land about the cities.

’Speak unto the children of {{c1::Israel}}, and say unto them: When ye pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

But if he smote him with an {{c1::instrument}} of iron, so that he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.
